hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$filepath" | grep -q 'server/src/'; then cd B:/claude/pragya2/server && npx eslint --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; fi
filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$filepath" | grep -qE '\.env$|\.env\.local$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit .env files - contains secrets' >&2; exit 2; fi
